check.title: Find a Product
check.search_placeholder: Search by product name or brand...
check.no_results_subtitle: Try a different search or paste the ingredient list below
check.paste_placeholder: Paste the full ingredient list here e.g. Water, Glycerin, Niacinamide...
check.input_methods: How would you like to check a product?
check.ocr_subtitle: Point your camera at the ingredients panel on the product
check.ocr_select_photo: Take a photo or upload from gallery
check.ocr_confidence_low: Low confidence — please check the list
check.ocr_error_no_ingredients: No ingredients found in this image
check.ocr_error_too_large: Image too large — try a closer photo
check.ocr_tip: Tip: lay the product flat, use good lighting, hold the camera parallel to the label
check.ocr_no_ingredients_visible: Ingredient list wasn't visible in the photo. We identified the product — want to search for its ingredients?

nudge.title: Complete your profile
nudge.subtitle: Add a note to get more personalised safety assessments
nudge.subtitle_v2: Add hair, body, and nail info for more targeted assessments

history.title: Assessment History
history.empty: No assessments yet. Start by checking a product.

saved.title: Saved
saved.empty_want_to_try: Nothing on your try list yet
saved.empty_sub: Go to Check to assess a product

chat.prompt_button: Ask a question about this product
chat.title: Ask anything
chat.limit_reached: You've reached the question limit for this product.
chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.empty_hint: Ask anything about the ingredients, safety, or how this product works for you.

assessment.verdict_anonymous_note: Search by product name to save this assessment.

reset_password.title: Set new password
reset_password.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account
reset_password.success: Password updated. Redirecting you to your profile…
reset_password.error_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
reset_password.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.password_sent: Reset link sent to your email
profile.delete_confirm_body: This permanently deletes all your data. Type "delete my account" to confirm.

skin_type.title: What is your skin type?
skin_type.subtitle: This helps us personalise your safety assessment

known_reactions.title: Have you ever reacted badly to a product or ingredient?
known_reactions.subtitle: This helps us flag ingredients that have affected you before
known_reactions.placeholder: Tell us which ones if you know e.g. fragrance, retinol...

gender.title: How do you identify?
gender.subtitle: This helps us personalise hormone-related ingredient flags

age.title: What is your age range?
age.subtitle: Age affects how certain ingredients interact with your body

hormone_therapy.title: Are you currently on hormone therapy?
hormone_therapy.subtitle: Hormone therapy affects how certain ingredients interact with your body

pregnancy.title: Are you currently pregnant or breastfeeding?
pregnancy.subtitle: Some ingredients carry higher risk during pregnancy and breastfeeding

hormonal_conditions.title: Do you have any hormonal conditions?
hormonal_conditions.subtitle: These affect how your body responds to certain ingredients

additional_notes.title: Anything else we should know?
additional_notes.subtitle: Allergies, conditions, sensitivities — anything that affects what you put on your skin

scalp_hair.title: Tell us about your scalp and hair
scalp_hair.subtitle: Helps us personalise assessments for hair and scalp products

body_skin.title: Any body skin concerns?
body_skin.subtitle: Helps us flag relevant ingredients in body products

nails.title: Tell us about your nails
nails.subtitle: Helps us flag relevant ingredients in nail products
nails.chemical_exposure_label: I regularly use gel, acrylic, or dip powder

sun_exposure.title: How much sun exposure do you get daily?
sun_exposure.subtitle: This affects how we flag photosensitising ingredients
